pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 11 to 17 to align with the new JDK baseline.
Upgrade the Quarkus platform version to 2.14.0.Final to support Java 17 and access newer features.
Remove the explicit Jakarta EE Web API dependency as it is likely managed by the Quarkus BOM or no longer needed explicitly.
Remove the explicit Eclipse MicroProfile dependency as it is likely managed by the Quarkus BOM or no longer needed explicitly.
Update the project version revision from 6.0.0 to 7.0.0 to reflect the new major release.
Enable deprecation warnings, general warnings, and Xlint in the Maven compiler plugin for better code quality visibility.

README.md.general_idea: Replace the Drone CI build status badge with an AWS CodeBuild badge to reflect the migration of the CI/CD pipeline.
README.md.human_impl: Changed markdown image URL from drone.cloudtrain.aws.msgoat.eu to codebuild.eu-west-1.amazonaws.com

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.general_idea: Update the Docker base image from Eclipse Temurin 11 to Eclipse Temurin 17 to align with the target JDK version.
Remove the UseG1GC flag because G1GC is the default garbage collector in JDK 17, making the explicit flag redundant.
Add an empty AGENT_JAVA_OPTS environment variable to allow for future Java agent configuration without modifying the Dockerfile.
Refactor the RUN command to use standard shell line continuation (&& \) instead of backslash-only line breaks for better readability and robustness.

src/main/docker/docker-entrypoint.sh.general_idea: Add support for AGENT_JAVA_OPTS environment variable to allow injecting Java agent arguments into the container startup command.
src/main/docker/docker-entrypoint.sh.human_impl: Added echo for AGENT_JAVA_OPTS and inserted ${AGENT_JAVA_OPTS} into the java execution command.

src/test/docker/cnj-hello-backend-quarku.general_idea: Rename the environment variable from EXT_JAVA_OPTS to AGENT_JAVA_OPTS to align with updated Quarkus container image conventions.
